query:
SELECT bi.id, bi.description, bi.amount, sba.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemId = bi.id
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0016'
ORDER BY bi.amount DESC;
